不愧为出版读物，拥有鬼吹灯盗墓笔记不相上下的热度，作者耳东水寿超一流水平，没有什么能说的，相当好看，五星还是不够，大家后传见！","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":20,"text":"鬼吹灯","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AC%BC%E5%90%B9%E7%81%AF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407326359D741D2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227003345674246980352%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226922362082025294861%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AC%BC%E5%90%B9%E7%81%AF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630593482,"group_id":"6922362082025294861","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"听书党，爱看无敌装b小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1xNghdN0oAMrzLQQq51fpejV86uzPFwk20VXtZpzaSZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57575ab9ca5c41d7a46cda4643acdc08~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616715&x-signature=Naa%2BOy%2FKdxqWPXiB2IAwhx7ggy8%3D","user_id":"3509254518218344","user_name":"尸X变"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3509254518218344","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743915417,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6922362082025294861","book_info":{"abstract":"《民调局异闻录》系列塑造了一个全新的悬疑小说世界：一个专门调查各种离奇、诡异、超自然事件真相的神秘组织和他们所面对的世界。
故事内容超级离奇、超级精彩！行文风格诙谐逗趣、悬念迭生，读之令人欲罢不能。
历史上，各种诡秘案件、妖邪怪物自有各种能人异士来对付——帝王家尊崇的天师、寺庙修行的和尚、游历江湖的术士……民国时有“宗教事务委员会”，而现在，则是“民调局”。
","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2a87f7d057b83336e15c59dbb3c52cec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"耳东水寿","author_id":"","book_id":"6922362082025294861","book_name":"民调局异闻录（全8册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a82828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"728.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7402498877875555353","read_count":"126003","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1609876"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"440","tags":"悬疑脑洞,精品小说,悬疑推理,灵异,第一人称,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2a87f7d057b83336e15c59dbb3c52cec~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257263&x-signature=rfuc%2FZcEwy%2BbIakjlyMjXoliCoM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.4896828e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140743EAAE0A8E294559D741D2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":232,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":150487,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":175383,"reply_count":11,"show_pv":254611},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7139784965474091779","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩！孙胖子精明得有点让人出乎意料，不过每每这种时候我都会用他是卧底出生来说服自己。对正义一方的卧底总有莫名的好感，总觉得他们一定比一般人敏锐聪颖，刚好孙胖子确实让人没处挑理。最好奇还有崇拜的是吴主任[爱慕]，戏份不多，但出场都是压轴大戏，虽然作者每次都用刻薄这类的词汇描写他，但是如果细想吴主任，历经千年，阅人遇事无数，要让他真正提起兴趣的人或事或许不多吧，那种藐视一切的态度也就可以理解了！
总之作者对书中出现的每一个人物的描写都是非常的有特点，不说细腻但绝对称得上是粗中有细，每个故事情节都让人看得直呼过瘾！不过胆子小就不要看了[捂脸]去继续追另外几部去……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662360853,"group_id":"6922362082025294861","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"活成自己喜欢的样子！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwZszCKSX0HkJ9S6diiuil5k7+NkpGSm1zvqwDylc4/f","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f9d86c2bcf044a63b449faa26e095077~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624332&x-signature=MR%2FxhtOo690FNQXkC66i0%2FWaF1c%3D","user_id":"1283839166779672","user_name":"小小巫仙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1283839166779672","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744286563,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6922362082025294861","book_info":{"abstract":"《民调局异闻录》系列塑造了一个全新的悬疑小说世界：一个专门调查各种离奇、诡异、超自然事件真相的神秘组织和他们所面对的世界。
故事内容超级离奇、超级精彩！行文风格诙谐逗趣、悬念迭生，读之令人欲罢不能。
历史上，各种诡秘案件、妖邪怪物自有各种能人异士来对付——帝王家尊崇的天师、寺庙修行的和尚、游历江湖的术士……民国时有“宗教事务委员会”，而现在，则是“民调局”。
